_meta.title: DRT recovery statistics
_meta.source: RBI 'Report on Trend and Progress of Banking in India'; Ministry of Finance / DRT data. Values below filled from SECONDARY reporting — see policy.
_meta.summary: Debts Recovery Tribunal volumes and recovery rate. DRT jurisdiction starts at ₹20 lakh, so it is OUT of the sub-₹1 lakh segment — recorded as cross-channel context only.
_meta.policy: PRIMARY = RBI 'Report on Trend and Progress of Banking in India' recovery-by-channel table, exact year. Recorded values are from SECONDARY reporting (June 2026 web search) → confidence:medium + TODO_VERIFY. Never fabricate.
